text: Hey there! I've been trying to use your software for a few days now, but it keeps crashing whenever I try to save my work. It's super frustrating because I can't get anything done. I really hope there’s a fix for this, but I’m not sure what’s causing it. Any help would be appreciated!
I'm really frustrated! My app keeps crashing whenever I try to save anything. It's so annoying!
can't log in. password not working. tried everything, still nothing.
I'm really frustrated! My app crashes every time I try to open it, but it was working fine yesterday. Can someone please help?

I've been feeling really confused about the features included in your premium subscription. Can someone explain what exactly makes it worth the extra cost? I just want to make sure I’m not missing out on something amazing!
Could you clarify the process for accessing your premium features? I seem to be facing some difficulty in locating the necessary information.

I am writing to express my dissatisfaction with the service I received regarding my recent order. Although I was promised a timely delivery, it has taken much longer than expected without any updates provided. I would appreciate a prompt resolution to this matter.
I cancled my subscription but was charged again! Plz refund this asap.
I am facing some complications concerning my account, but I'm not quite sure what's wrong. Could you possibly help me clarify the current status or any issues that might exist?

I just wanted to express my disappointment regarding my recent order. I placed it a while ago, and although I was promised a swift delivery, it has been much longer than anticipated. I even checked my order status multiple times through your app, and it still says it’s processing, which is quite frustrating. I would have expected better service given the promises made. Can someone please let me know what's going on?
i got charged more than i thought!? i wanted to switch to monthly. plz help!!!
I read the policy about refunds but I'm unsure if it applies to my situation. Can you clarify?
My app keeps crashing, but it shouldn't. I didn't do anything to it. Help?
I can't log into my account. The password isn't working and I don't remember the recovery info.

I’m really confused about my account status because last week I received an email saying my subscription was canceled, but when I log in, it shows that I'm still active, which doesn’t make any sense! Can you please help clarify this for me? I thought I was supposed to have access until the end of the month, but now it looks like I might not, and that’s really upsetting since I was planning to use the service a lot this month. Just to be clear, I’m so frustrated by this whole situation, so I need to know what’s going on as soon as possible.

I recently attempted to change my email address associated with my account, but I received a notification saying that the current email is already in use. Could you clarify if there's a limitation on email changes for accounts? I believed that I could update it freely.
